title: Memex configuration
description: Schema for memex.config.json — the project-owned file that drives every Memex hook.

profile.description: Which profile this project was initialised from.

pluginVersion.description: Pinned version of the Memex plugin. Optional but recommended.

root.description: Folder under the project root that holds the wiki. Default: '.memex'.

allowedTopLevel.description: Names allowed at the top level of the wiki root. Writes outside this list are blocked.

datedFolders.description: Folders under the wiki root where children must be dated, e.g. `.audits/DDMMYYYY-HHMM/`.

readmeRequired.description: Patterns under which a new slug folder must begin with README.md. Use glob with `*` for the slug slot, e.g. 'entities/*'.

appliesTo.description: Glob patterns (relative to the wiki root) that require frontmatter.

required.description: Frontmatter fields that must be present and non-empty.

enum.description: Optional enum constraints on specific frontmatter fields.

enumDisplayNames.description: Optional human-readable labels for enum values. Keyed by enum field, then by enum value. e.g. { "type": { "plot-thread": "Plot thread" } }. The docsite uses these for the page-type badge; falls back to title-casing the raw value.

naming.description: Naming conventions for folders and files under the wiki root.

asciiOnly.description: If true, restrict kebab-case to ASCII [a-z0-9]. If false (default), accept any Unicode lowercase/caseless letter (Ll, Lo categories) — supports Japanese, Greek, Cyrillic, Arabic, etc. Hyphens are always ASCII; extensions are always ASCII for portability.

filePattern.description: Optional override regex for filenames. Default is kebab-case with an optional two-digit prefix.

folderPattern.description: Optional override regex for folder names. Default is kebab-case.

exceptions.description: Names that bypass kebab-case enforcement (e.g. README.md, .resolved).

codeToDocMapping.description: Rules linking code paths to required wiki pages.

codePattern.description: Glob pattern matched against paths relative to the project root. `*` captures a slug; use `{1}`, `{2}` in `requiresDoc` to reference captures.

requiresDoc.description: Relative doc path under the wiki root. Supports `{1}`-style substitutions from `codePattern` captures. Use ' OR ' between alternatives to accept any one.

stateKey.description: Optional namespace for per-session state tracking (used by warn-then-block).

entryPrefix.description: Template for log entry prefix. Placeholders: {date}, {event}, {subject}.

sections.description: Top-level headings Memex auto-maintains in index.md and the docsite sidebar uses for nav. Either an array of strings (heading == display name) or an array of objects with explicit display name plus the frontmatter.type values that belong under it.

name.description: Heading shown in index.md and the docsite sidebar.

slug.description: Optional URL-safe slug; defaults to kebab-case of `name`.

types.description: frontmatter.type values that belong in this section. Pages with no matching type fall through to a synthetic 'uncategorised' section.

search.description: Search engine config for the UserPromptSubmit retrieval hook.

updateCheckUrl.description: Optional override for the GitHub Releases API URL polled by the update-check hook. Useful for locked-down corporate environments that mirror GitHub. Defaults to the official repo.

hookEvents.description: Per-event toggles and tuning parameters for session-lifecycle hooks.

updateCheck.description: If true, poll GitHub for a newer release once every 24h and surface an update notice at session start. Off by default — opt in if you want upgrade notifications.
